message:
refactor: Mutex to RwLock for mute_storage, update proptests

main.rs: Switch NotificationPipeline's mute_storage from Mutex to
RwLock. Mute state is read far more often than written (every
notification check vs occasional user mute toggle), so RwLock allows
concurrent readers without contention.

proptest_recorder_replay.rs: Update proptest strategies and assertions
for the new ReplayEquivalenceLevel enum (Structural/Decision/Full)
introduced in the replay determinism validation commit.

proptest_latency_stages.proptest-regressions: Add new regression seed
discovered during blast-radius analysis property testing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
